mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in the unemployment rate above 0.3 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or t-test p-value > 0.05 for return difference in triggered vs non-triggered periods.

mechanism_narrative: A concurrent decline in industrial production and housing starts indicates weakening demand, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls > 2% and HOUST falls > 1.5% in 3 months
failure_condition: 60d forward returns in triggered periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rising consumer price index above 0.5% monthly growth signals inflationary pressures, prompting central bank tightening that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp drop in industrial production below its 12-month moving average indicates supply-side shocks, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5d forward returns in triggered periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 1-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in nonfarm payrolls above 100k monthly growth signals strong labor market dynamics, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60d forward returns in baseline periods are not significantly higher than triggered periods (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.04 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A concurrent decline in real sales and housing starts indicates weakening consumer demand, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS falls > 1% and HOUST falls > 1.5% in 1 month
failure_condition: 20d forward returns in triggered periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rising federal funds rate above 5% signals monetary tightening, which increases discount rates and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 1-year rolling window.
